description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:latest image and defines a variable IMAGE_TAG_LATEST as $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:latest. Include a before_script that logs in to registry.gitlab.com with the gitlab-ci-token and $CI_JOB_TOKEN. Define a single stage called build and a build job that runs only on the master branch, executes docker build -t $IMAGE_TAG_LATEST . and then docker push $IMAGE_TAG_LATEST. The job is assigned to the build stage.
